programmes.show_description: A football fan is caught offside with a bogus stolen luggage claim. A dog owner is caught attempting to take a policy out on a puppy after it's been injured.

After 17-year-old Shari Smith is abducted, killer Larry Gene Bell calls the family to taunt them. As another girl is taken nearby, detectives race to catch him.
The team at Hull Royal Infirmary has another busy night: a man is involved in a motorbike collision with a deer and a young patient is in agony with his ankle facing the wrong way.
Phoebe's half-brother makes an astounding announcement. Joey finds himself in a class struggle.
Senior vet Ken must enlist the help of young vet David as they deal with a Suffolk tup.

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: Things are going missing all over the Little Kingdom, and soon Ben and Holly realise that ants are stealing their things! (VS)
Granny Pig shows Peppa and George her poultry. Elsewhere, something has been eating Grandpa Pig's lettuces.
It is Talent Day at Peppa's playgroup. Madame Gazelle wants everyone to show the class their special talent.
There's a spider in the kitchen sink! Fluff is eager to play but can Tweedy overcome his fear? (Ep21)
When Badger is accidentally covered in paint, Squiggle and his friends face the tricky task of persuading him to take a bath. The only problem is Badger doesn't like baths!
...Big Adventures! Thomas finds a stray dog on his route and decides to bring it on board to help find its owner, but the dog soon causes trouble for Thomas.
When Hannah turns the Pontypandy Ocean Parade into a race, an ocean rescue is required.
A Trip to the Moon: Peppa's family go to the museum's moon exhibition with George's friend Edmond Elephant.
The Browns are fed up with Bessie the camper van breaking down, so Paddington sells her but soon regrets being so helpful.
While playing shadow stompers, Posy fibs that she has successfully jumped on Pip's shadow. When Pip finds out, Posy has to come clean and apologise for cheating.
Chickaletta and Roosterio run away from a chicken show and get stuck on top of a runaway drone.
The Bark Yard safety inspection is today! But will Motor go boom and cost the Crew a gold safety star?
Peppa and her family drive across America, where they fly over the canyon and discover a cave from 700AD.
Peppa is out with Suzy and Granny Sheep in Mummy Sheep's car. They come across an old van that Miss Rabbit is recycling. Granny Sheep decides she would like to turn it into an art van.
When the Rumblefest tree for Rumblefest Eve is nowhere to be seen, Tim must find a way to save the day!
Stan keeps hearing the tune of an ice cream van but it's not there! Seals are singing, whistles are blowing and birds are barking! What's going on?
Digi and Tal build a giant Robo-Ducky that runs amok through Adventure Bay, and they're stuck on top.
While helping Otto with some building jobs, Milo and his friends quickly get in over their heads and are forced to work together to make sure no job goes unfinished.
The king declares that no one can celebrate his birthday, because he doesn't want to get any older.
Mummy Pig shows Peppa and her friend Suzy Sheep some old photographs from when they were babies.
Odo's Mum and Dad drop Odo off at Forest Camp where he learns one of the most important lessons for a bird-caring for an egg.
Join Kiera as she discovers all about the wonderful world of salsa dancing with the help of some Milkshakers. (Ep3)
Join David for a story about Sitara and her special gift - her name. But as Sitara grows, some people jumble up her name until it's not her name anymore.

National and international news.

Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!
A famous face returns to Bakerbury, stirring up the past and triggering tensions. As emotions run high and secrets unravel, The Puzzle Lady faces one of her toughest challenges yet.
Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.
The rivers of the Cairngorms are alive with wildlife - from salmon to otters, dippers to kingfishers. At night, camps of bats glide over water in search of food before they hibernate.
Susan visits the south Scottish Glens and the Isle of Arran, uncovering hidden treasures, enjoying local festivals, and exploring art installations and whisky distilleries.
Jeremy Vine is joined by team captains Sally Lindsay and Carol Vorderman and their guests: gold medal-winning Paralympian Jonnie Peacock and Jenny Ryan from The Chase.

programmes.show_name: New: Alice Roberts: Our Hospital Through Time
programmes.show_description: A look back at hospital food over the centuries, the work of renowned doctor William Harvey and a cancer treatment that temporarily makes a patient radioactive. (Ep6/6)

programmes.show_name: New: Warship: Life on the Frontline
programmes.show_description: JJ Chalmers gets exclusive access to HMS Prince of Wales, the Royal Navy's biggest British warship as she prepares for the most dangerous leg of its epic eight-month deployment.
In Birmingham, staff handle a severe asthma attack and a brutal assault. In Tunbridge Wells, a patient collapses in triage, leaving the team fighting to save his life.
There's major trauma when a hay bale lands on a farmer's head in a remote location. Plus, a battle to save a man in cardiac arrest, and a 76-year-old woman has fallen down the stairs.
In Northamptonshire, Colin deals with a car that has ran out of petrol near Watford services, and in Skye, recovery driver Cara is out to collect a car with a punctured tyre. (Ep8)

A 64-year-old is rushed to hospital after falling onto fire stoking tools; a 48-year-old man is brought in after having been beaten with a baseball bat and bitten.
An elderly man is in dire straits after being run over by a motorcycle. A man struggles after being stabbed multiple times, including in the neck.
A game between Chandler and Joey against Monica and Rachel escalates into a full-blown contest where the stakes are raised higher. Phoebe finds out whether she is pregnant or not.
Observational documentary series following vets in Thurso and Wick. David receives an emergency call from a shepherdess when a mother struggles to feed her lambs. (VS)

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: Barnaby Elf's uncle Redbeard comes to visit the Little Kingdom, but he has lost his pirate treasure. (VS)
Grandpa at the Playground: Grandpa Pig takes Peppa and George to the playground, but does not understand the children's rules.
Goldie the Fish: Goldie the fish does not look happy and is not eating her food, so Peppa, George and Mummy Pig take her on a bus trip to visit Dr Hamster the vet.
A shadow on the tent spooks Fluff and threatens to spoil Tweedy's camping plan! (Ep22)
Fluff and Nok-nok show off their special talents in the treehouse, Squiggle is concerned that he doesn't have any talent. But With Badger's help he discovers he does!
...Big Adventures! When a Railway Show for little engines comes to Sodor, an overly excited Percy finally sees his chance to shine.
When James, Mandy and Annie use the horse and cart to deliver their cherry pop to The Taste of Pontypandy competition, chaos ensues!
Funfair: Peppa and her family head off for an exciting time at the funfair. Mummy Pig tries to win a giant teddy for Peppa.
Mr Curry wants to become a ranger leader and creates nature club to impress Ms Potts.
Frankie has some fun face paint for her spooky fancy dress but it runs out before she gets to use it. Her friends find a way to make her an amazing spooky costume.
When Bettina wanders up Jake's mountain and gets caught in a snowstorm, it's up to the PAW Patrol to bring her safely down.
Rubble & Crew build the first train station in Builder Cove just in time to welcome Farmer Zoe's new cow Mootilda.
Peppa and her family finally make it to Hollywood and arrive at the film set to meet Mr Potato and Hash Brown.
Granny Sheep is driving Vanessa, the art van along the road with Peppa, Suzy, Pedro, Mandy, Molly and Danny. They are taking her to Grampy Rabbit's boat yard, for her first-ever outing!
Tim and Kai worry they've ruined Rumblefest.
Stan is intrigued when he spots strange lights in the night sky. Grumblestunk thinks it's an alien invasion, but Stan and Gran are not so sure...
Mayor Goodway tries to catch a glimpse of a migrating penguin colony but her precious Chickaletta and a Baby Penguin accidentally switch places.
After Rodney is called away by police work, he leaves Milo, Lofty and Lark to take his place in the Bake-a-Thon tent, instructing them to follow his recipe to the letter to win.
Holly breaks her wand and must go to the wand factory at the bottom of the Great Elf Tree to get it fixed.
Snowy Mountain: Peppa and her friends are learning how to ski. Their teacher is a former world champion, but it's Mummy Pig who impresses.
Odo and Doodle meet jolly chickens Jo, Flo and Shirley, who tell the pair that they always have fun in Club Chicken - the silliest club in the forest.
Join Kiera as she discovers all about the wonderful world of hip-hop dancing with the help of some Milkshakers. (Ep4)
Join Olivia for a story about the curious young Sareta and her mum. As they walk through town, Sareta comes up with questions about their journey and has her own fantastical answers!

Sutton Park in Birmingham is one of Europe's largest urban national nature reserves. Senior ranger Danny Squire explains how grazing Exmoor ponies help preserve the heathland.

programmes.show_name: New: Yorkshire's Poshest Hotel: Grantley Hall
programmes.show_description: Behind the opulent doors of Grantley Hall, North Yorkshire as it pursues its ambition to be one of the world's best hotels, with rooms ranging from £1000-£4500 a night. (Ep1/4)
Can Alex Polizzi restore the fortunes of The Castle Inn, Sussex, which dates back to the 16th century but now features tacky decor, mismatched rooms, and a soulless restaurant?
This series follows detectives in their relentless pursuit of a killer. George Murdoch's 1983 murder remains unsolved, but a new DNA lead offers hope in the hunt for the murderer. (Ep1)
